svg.text: Bottom-center barred gate fitted to the full painted gate and foreground fence span.
Lower-middle blue crypt fitted to the full painted roof and front stair silhouette.
Lower-right winged red temple fitted to the full painted wings and base.
Lower-left demon maw lava cave tightened to the outer horns and lowered to avoid excess top margin.
Upper-left glowing green portal gate fitted to the painted arch silhouette, not only the portal glow.
Upper-left lava ruin ring fitted to the outer ring and lava base instead of the doorway opening.
Upper-middle stone mausoleum expanded to the full roofline and grave-side base.
Center graveyard pit fitted to the full pit rim and grave cluster.
Upper-right throne/altar structure fitted to the painted dais and banners, not only the crown detail.
Top-left fortress castle fitted to the full painted keep and flanking towers.
